name: Chocolate Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse the Oreo cookies in a food processor.
2. Stir in melted butter.
3. Line a springform pan with parchment and press the crust mixture into the bottom.
4. Melt the chocolate and pieces of butter in a double boiler.
5. Whip egg yolks and sugar until lemon-colored.
6. Stir in the melted chocolate, whisking to combine.
7. Whip egg whites until they form soft peaks.
8. Fold the whipped whites into the chocolate mixture. Add cognac.
9. Spoon the filling into the crust and chill for 6 hours.
10. May be topped with chantilly and chocolate shavings.
